mapper.select: SELECT ID, ORG_CODE, ORG_NAME, ORG_SNAME, ORG_TYPE, ORG_LEVEL, ORG_STATUS, SUPER_ORG_CODE, HIERARCHY_CODE, REGION_CODE, REGION_NAME, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, IS_DELETED FROM BPM_ORG_INFO WHERE ORG_LEVEL = '0002' AND IS_DELETED = '0' ORDER BY ORG_CODE

SELECT t3.ORG_CODE AS branch_code, t3.ORG_NAME AS branch_name, t2.ORG_CODE AS center_code, t2.ORG_NAME AS center_name, t1.ORG_CODE AS sub_code, t1.ORG_NAME AS sub_name FROM BPM_ORG_INFO t1 INNER JOIN BPM_ORG_INFO t2 ON t1.SUPER_ORG_CODE = t2.ORG_CODE INNER JOIN BPM_ORG_INFO t3 ON t2.SUPER_ORG_CODE = t3.ORG_CODE WHERE t1.ORG_LEVEL = '0004' AND t1.IS_DELETED = '0' AND t2.IS_DELETED = '0' AND t3.IS_DELETED = '0' AND t1.ORG_NAME NOT LIKE '%营业部%' AND t1.ORG_NAME NOT LIKE '%营销%' ORDER BY t1.ORG_CODE
